title: cryptantha divaricata
intro: Cryptantha divaricata, also known as spreading needleleaf or spreading cryptantha, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Cryptantha divaricata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for consumption, or used topically for skin issues.
